headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 15-16, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a crucial 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense. In the American League, the Boston Red Sox dominated the Minnesota Twins 9-5, thanks to Trevor Story's two home runs and five RBIs. The St. Louis Cardinals also secured a win, taking down the Cleveland Guardians 5-3.

Injuries and availability have impacted several teams. The Texas Rangers placed right-handed pitcher Chris Martin on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The Rangers also placed Luis Curvelo on the 15-day injured list with a right biceps strain and Cody Bradford on the 60-day injured list for left elbow surgery rehab. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the New York Mets, Colorado Rockies, Houston Astros, San Francisco Giants.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Philadelphia Phillies traded right-handed pitcher Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations and international bonus pool money. The Baltimore Orioles acquired first baseman Christian Encarnacion-Strand from the Cincinnati Reds in exchange for cash. The Chicago White Sox traded second baseman Lenyn Sosa to the Toronto Blue Jays for outfielder Jordan Rich and future considerations.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Take Down Orioles 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured an 8-5 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Adrian Del Castillo leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs. Kevin Ginkel pitched 2 strong innings, striking out 4 batters and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 5-3 win over the Cleveland Guardians in their matchup. Alec Burleson led the Cardinals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Twins 9-5**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 9-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Trevor Story leading the offense. Story hit 2 home runs, drove in 5 runs, and had 4 at-bats in the win.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall Short in Detroit**
top_news.summary: The Kansas City Royals dropped a 1-2 decision to the Detroit Tigers, with Wenceel Pérez leading the Royals' offense with a home run and an RBI. Seth Lugo pitched 6.2 innings for the Royals, striking out 7 batters and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rangers Place Chris Martin on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Texas Rangers right-handed pitcher Chris Martin has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The move was made on April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Phillies Make Roster Move Ahead of Opening Day**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies have made a trade involving a right-handed pitcher, with Griff McGarry being sent to the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for future considerations and international bonus pool money.
